headline: Citizens Financial Group Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call Details
summary: PROVIDENCE, R.I., March 10, 2026--As previously announced, Citizens Financial Group, Inc. (NYSE: CFG) will report its first quarter 2026 earnings on April 16, 2026. The news release and supplemental materials will be available at http://investor.citizensbank.com. CFG management will host a live conference call that morning with details as follows:
